canonical_definition: Assigning a numerical score to an LLM-generated response on a Likert scale based on predefined evaluation criteria.

definitions.text: The process of assigning a scalar score on a Likert scale to evaluate the quality of generated text, typically based on criteria like consistency, coherence, fluency, and relevance.
